Author: The Enceladeum
Name: HMoniker
Description: Changes your display name. Local only: visible only to yourself outside of HMS (HMapSync) sessions.
Changelog: 1.2.0: new "Hide name" checkbox alongside "Hide FC tag". When on, your nameplate name is blanked entirely; it overrides any custom name you've composed. In HMS (HMapSync) sessions the choice follows you to other clients, just like Hide FC tag (Moniker IPC v2.2, backward compatible).
